conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.
Answer using the special rule explained earlier. The negative pressure system fails in the Pan-Asia Gene Pharmaceutical BSL-4 laboratory. According to the supreme biosafety code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle negative pressure system failure in a BSL-4 laboratory</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:70005] Time: 2026-06-08-17:20, Content: Pan-Asia Gene Pharmaceutical Supreme Biosafety Code: If the negative pressure system in a BSL-4 laboratory fails, close all airtight biosafety doors; if an unknown mutant strain is found in a culture dish, inject a high-concentration nuclease to completely degrade it; if a centrifuge rotor disintegrates and splinters, trigger the explosion-proof armor closure lock; if the waste liquid inactivation procedure is unexpectedly interrupted, activate the high-temperature and high-pressure secondary incinerator. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:70005] stipulates that if the negative pressure system fails, close all airtight biosafety doors.
conversations.content: According to the supreme biosafety code, you must close all airtight biosafety doors!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
